title: Worse on Purpose
excerpt: The brands you trusted quietly gutted quality to protect margins. Investigative essays on corporate enshittification. Free newsletter.
content_html:
Corporate autopsies on the brands you trust. Who bought them, who gutted them, and what's still worth buying.
